mapper.select: /* IbOrderInfoMapper.xml selectErpIbOrderHdInfoList */ SELECT EAI.REQORDERNO -- H/D , EAI.IBEXPCTDAY AS ORDERISTDAY , COALESCE(REQ.IBEXPCTDAY, EAI.IBEXPCTDAY) AS DLVYEXPCTDAY , EAI.FROMCTKEY -- H , EAI.TOCTKEY -- H , EAI.ORDERTYPE -- H --, EAI.SHMISTNO -- H , EAI.TRN_ID FROM TORDER_EAI_IBORDER_BATCH EAI LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_REQORDER REQ ON EAI.REQORDERNO = REQ.REQORDERNO WHERE EAI.SND_PROC_TYP IN ('N','E','R') AND EAI.SND_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY EAI.TRN_ID , EAI.REQORDERNO , EAI.IBEXPCTDAY , EAI.FROMCTKEY , EAI.TOCTKEY , EAI.ORDERTYPE --, EAI.SHMISTNO , REQ.IBEXPCTDAY ORDER BY EAI.REQORDERNO

/* IbOrderInfoMapper.xml selectErpIbOrderDtInfoList */ SELECT EAI.REQORDERNO -- H/D , EAI.SHMISTNO , EAI.ICKEY -- D , 'EA' AS ISTUNIT -- D , (EAI.IBEXPCTQTY)::TEXT AS IBEXPCTQTY -- D , EAI.TRN_ID FROM TORDER_EAI_IBORDER_BATCH EAI WHERE EAI.SND_PROC_TYP IN ('N','E','R') AND EAI.SND_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY EAI.REQORDERNO, EAI.ICKEY
